overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character exploring interconnected courtyards and alleys in a historic New Orleans-inspired city. The character walks through stone-paved courtyards with tropical vegetation, transitions through covered passages, briefly emerges onto a sunlit street with brick buildings, and continues through narrow alleys into populated courtyard areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with central fountain and potted palms

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through courtyard toward stone archway

entered.detail: stone fountain with water in the center of the courtyard
arched stone passage leading to next courtyard
large potted palm plants in ceramic containers
weathered wooden building with blue shutters and sandbags
multi-story stone building with iron balcony railings

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a sunlit courtyard featuring a central stone fountain surrounded by potted palm plants. The camera follows from behind as the character walks toward a stone archway ahead, with historic stone buildings on the left and a wooden structure with sandbags on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with white staircase transitioning to covered walkway

events.description: passes through stone archway into second courtyard with white staircase
enters darker covered passage with significantly reduced light

agents.ego_description: walking through archway into inner courtyard, passing white staircase on left, then entering shaded corridor

entered.detail: white painted wooden staircase with railings leading to upper floor
dark covered passage with wooden beams overhead
brick walls covered in dense green ivy

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway into a second courtyard featuring a prominent white exterior staircase on the left and walls covered in dense ivy. The character continues toward and enters a darker covered passage where natural light diminishes significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with historic brick buildings and painted advertisements

events.description: exits covered passage onto bright sunlit street
turns right toward iron gate leading to alley

agents.ego_description: emerges onto cobblestone street, walks past yellow building with 'INSTRUMENTS' sign and brick warehouse with painted ads, then turns into gated alley

notable_agents.action: man leaning against wall near the iron gate
person sitting on chair near building entrance

entered.detail: two-story yellow building with green trim and 'INSTRUMENTS' signage
large brick building with faded painted advertisements for 'RARE OLD IRISH WHISKEY' and 'JANSENS FLOUR'
black iron gate with pointed finials leading to alleyway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark passage onto a sunlit cobblestone street lined with historic buildings. A distinctive yellow building with green trim stands on the left while a large brick building with vintage painted advertisements dominates the view ahead. The character walks toward and turns right into an iron gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alleyway between tall buildings

events.description: enters narrow brick alley through iron gate
light increases as approaching open courtyard ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage with brick walls and stacked wooden planks on the right

entered.detail: piles of wooden planks and lumber stacked against brick wall
tall red brick walls forming narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the iron gate into a narrow brick alleyway. Tall brick walls line both sides with stacks of wooden planks visible on the right. The passage gradually brightens as the character approaches an opening to another courtyard area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: interconnected courtyards with wooden structures and NPC activity

events.description: emerges from narrow alley into populated courtyard area
passes through vine-covered stone archway into adjacent courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through series of connected courtyards, passing NPCs engaged in daily activities near wooden structures

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress standing with hands on hips near wooden crates
man in suspenders walking away through archway

entered.detail: weathered wooden buildings with balconies and external staircases
stone archway covered in dense green vines connecting courtyards
old-fashioned hand water pump near wooden barrels
wooden barrels and crates stacked near walls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a series of interconnected courtyards populated with NPCs. Wooden structures with external staircases line the area, and a vine-covered stone archway provides passage between sections. Various wooden barrels, crates, and an old water pump are scattered throughout the cobblestone ground as the character continues exploring the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of historic courtyards and narrow passages that transition from open, sunlit gardens to confined urban alleys. It begins in a bright courtyard centered around a stone fountain and potted palms, following the character as they move toward a stone archway. As the character passes through the arch, the scene shifts into a second courtyard with ivy-covered walls and a white exterior staircase before plunging into the shadows of a dark covered passage. The camera then emerges back into the sunlight onto a cobblestone street lined with a yellow building and a large brick wall featuring vintage advertisements, before turning right through an iron gate into a narrow brick alleyway. Finally, the passage brightens as the camera opens into a series of interconnected, populated courtyards filled with wooden structures, vine-covered arches, and scattered crates.
